svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-02-13: Gemini abuse recon, Lazarus npm/PyPI, Copilot Studio risks

g.text: Nation-state actors weaponize Gemini for recon and code-gen
DPRK-linked malicious packages target dev wallets and CI
Agent security risks ranked from prompt-inject to data leak
